review_title: A comprehensive platform for performance management and employee growth
description: Leapsome is an excellent choice for companies (medium to large size) that are looking to improve the performance management, employee development and engagement. It stands out for its comprehensive feature set, ease of use and ability to drive culture of continuous feedback and growth.
author: Moustafa A.
pros: Leapsome's performance management tools are one of the key strengths about the product, it allows for setting a personalized objectives and key results and regular check-ins. The tools are designed to ensure employees receive continuous feedback and be able to track the progress of the goals. Leapcome also enables the enterprise to implement L&D strategies very effectively, with the individual development plans and goal tracking features, it empowers the employees to take charge of their career growth. The customization and Reporting are great options in Leapsome that allows the enterprise to adapt the platform to fit our specific needs in every department.
cons: The pricing is higher compared to other platforms in the market, especially if the enterprise would need to have advanced features, then this will have a huge impact on the total pricing structure. The platform is generally easy to use, however for some departments we noticed that not all the employees were able to fully utilize all of its features.

description: My overall experience was great would highly recommend it to friends
author: Judy H.
pros: Very simple and easy to use the instructions was very easy to understand
cons: The loading of the was very slow at uploading customers support was slow
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: What really captivates me is its robust assemblage of software functions. Chief among these is the goal-setting module. If you want your objectives to align seamlessly with those of your teams and organization, then you need to set up not just a set of clear goals but also a conversation around those goals.
author: ady haris A.
pros: Leapsome's standout quality is its user-friendly interface.
cons: A couple of weaknesses could be mentioned, perhaps—the learning curve and the limited mobile app consultation—but I think it’s safe to call Leapsome a powerful platform for something I like to think more than just a few companies at this point are aspiring to: A culture of continuous improvement, a more engaged workforce, and as some of our friends from Leapsome might put it, “substantial benefits when implemented thoughtfully.”
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Running review cycles with Leapsome is much smoother than before – and now our employees are actual
description: We were surprised by how dynamic the platform is, encouraging mutual feedback and review best practices - clearly it’s much more than just a way to digitise administrative processes. The Leapsome team was consistently supportive throughout, and with their guidance we managed to transfer all our paperwork and processes into the system successfully. Reassuringly we could rely on a single contact person who was always there to help. Because the launch of our new performance review process using Leapsome was so helpful we’re now looking to use further features like Goals, Instant Feedback and 1-on-1 Meetings. We also plan to roll out the platform more widely, bringing it to our branches in other countries.
author: Giorgia F.
pros: Leapsome is easy to use and sophisticated with its capabilities. You can set up review cycles super quickly using their best-practice templates, and because it’s always clear to the review participants who is submitting answers and when, employees feel a lot more involved than they did under our previous system (which was one-sided and didn’t encourage reviewees to give much input). Now that employees have to do a self-assessment before receiving a review talk, our participation rate has shot up to 100%. The review answers themselves can be framed numerically or as text, which is great because it means we get a deeper understanding of both individual reviews and each review cycle as a whole. Unlike with our old system, Leapsome gives us a way to view the data in lots of different ways with their analytics features.
cons: To be honest, we didn’t encounter the cons we’d anticipated! Some felt reluctant to change our old HR system, which had been in place since around 2000, and as part of the HR team, I wondered if Leapsome would just overcomplicate a manual system I was familiar with. To our relief, it wasn’t difficult to use Leapsome at all! Our existing employees are very happy with the platform and all our new hires start using it with ease.

review_title: Easy to use platform that has helped us build structured feedback processes for professional develop
description: Our experience with Leapsome has been excellent. The launch and rollout of the platform was really straightforward thanks to the Personio integration and the easy to follow set up guides. The reaction has been overwhelmingly positive and the platform was well received by everyone in the company. With Leapsome, we now have a platform in place to run scalable people management processes to support our continued growth.
author: Jeron B.
pros: Leapsome has many options for customisation when setting up the platform and the different processes. The UX is great and I was easily able to set up our 360-degree performance reviews and employee engagement surveys myself without any additional support. Rolling out new performance management processes with Leapsome has meant that our employees now get the feedback they need for their professional development and we’re able to measure the impact of these changes. We’ve already seen an improvement in some of the key employee engagement metrics since the launch.
cons: I haven’t found anything to be a problem. The platform is constantly improving and getting better so there are always new features being added that I’m looking forward to exploring.

description: I have been using Leapsome for almost 6 months and it has become a valuable resource in my work day.

It is unfair because we won't be using it for a whole 3 months during the summer and do not know the certainty of the next school year. Made us lock into another contract without letting us know of a renewal for a whole year. Waste of money.
